headline: Investors Are Betting on an Interest Rate Hike That’s Really Not That Likely
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Investors have lifted odds that the Federal Reserve is on the verge of raising interest rates, but lingering labor-market fragility and the risks to growth from surging oil prices make that a long shot, at least for now.On March 19, federal funds rate futures showed a 6% chance of an April hike, and have stayed in positive territory since. This marked the first time since December 2023 that investors saw a hike at the central bank’s next policy meeting as more likely than a cut.Th

headline: Saudi Arabia, Kuwait Seek to Pursue Energy Deals Despite War
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Saudi Arabia and Kuwait are attempting to press on with planned multibillion-dollar energy deals despite a widening conflict that’s seen Iran target oil and gas infrastructure across the Middle East over the past three weeks.Kuwait Petroleum Corp.’s attempts to lease part of its pipeline network has drawn interest from large private equity and infrastructure funds, according to people familiar with the matter.
